title: [Q] How do I find merged rows in ExcelJS?
author: lnvtphu-tma
body:
How do I find merged rows in ExcelJS?
Example: In an Excel file, a cell is merged from A14 to A22. How do I find merged rows in ExcelJS? The expected result is rows 14 to 22

comments.author: LSL1618
comments.body: Same question, if someone has answer, inform me.
